projectSource.usage: Actual source for the 15-second hard-cut preview.

projectTranscriptSegments.text: It had never occurred to us before
that we were doing something bad,
we were doing something that would have negative consequences
when we sent papers to traditional journals
and we signed over our copyright to those journals.
We never thought about that as being something
that would impair the ability of anyone else to use it.
But now it was completely obvious.
And so that set in motion,
And that realization that, first of all, electronic publishing enabled a whole new way of using
the scientific literature that had never been possible before, and the fact that the silly
way in which we choose to pay for scientific journals, and the fact that authors of scientific
papers give their rights away to publishers, we now realize that that was the big obstacle
to achieving a better publishing system.

phrases.selectionReason: A compact opening hook from the project sample that mirrors the reference asset's first strong topic-setting phrase.
